# foreign_tracts { #tspaint.foreign_tracts }

```python
tspaint.foreign_tracts(
    ts,
    labels,
    samples,
    *,
    min_score=0.5,
    mode='auto',
    K=2,
    Q0=None,
    max_iter=8,
    soft_refs=None,
)
```

Anonymous foreign-tract inference: where a haplotype is foreign to its expectation
(Plan A Workflow 2; CLAUDE.md §2.3, §9).

Flags tracts **without attributing a donor**. The foreignness score is per segment:

* a **labelled** sample (in ``labels``) — ``1 - loo[label]``: how much the leave-one-out
  genealogy withholds from its own label (its introgression, source-agnostic);
* an **unlabelled** query — ``(1 - fit) / (1 - 1/K)`` where ``fit = max_s loo[s]``: how
  poorly it fits any panel source ("fits nothing"), normalised so a maximally-ambiguous
  tract scores 1.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**ts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Tree sequence to analyse.

<code>[**labels**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Reference sample id -> ancestry-state label.

<code>[**samples**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[iterable](`iterable`)\[[int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Samples to scan (references and/or queries).

<code>[**min_score**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [0.5]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Flag segments whose foreignness score ``>= min_score`` (default ``0.5`` — the expected ancestry gets less than half the support).

<code>[**mode**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(\'auto\', \'label\', \'fit\')]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [\"auto\"]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   ``"auto"`` (default) uses the label rule for labelled samples and the fit rule for queries; ``"label"`` / ``"fit"`` force one rule for all samples.

<code>[**K**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [2]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Model / EM controls (see :func:`tspaint.fit`).

<code>[**Q0**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [2]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Model / EM controls (see :func:`tspaint.fit`).

<code>[**max_iter**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [2]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Model / EM controls (see :func:`tspaint.fit`).

<code>[**soft_refs**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [2]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Model / EM controls (see :func:`tspaint.fit`).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[tuple](`tuple`)\[[float](`float`), [float](`float`), [float](`float`)\]\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per sample, merged foreign tracts ``(left, right, score)``.
